metadata.title: Down by the Riverside
metadata.subtitle: African American spiritual / peace song, publ. 1918
metadata.lyricist: Traditional African American spiritual, first published in *Plantation Melodies* (1918)
metadata.x_pd_basis: Anonymous traditional African American spiritual, antebellum origin, first formally published 1918. PD by > 100 years and entered US PD via the 95-year rule. Famously associated with the U.S. Civil Rights movement
